audit_items.proof_trace: The check at L103 (`if (msg.sender != address(s_auction) || from != address(this)) revert AccessForbidden()`) is the first statement executed, before any state mutation. `s_auction` is private and only settable by DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE via `_setAuction`, which enforces non-zero address and interface compliance. No alternative code paths bypass this guard.
